positive: A stylized, geometric celestial constellation design featuring a mythical forest spirit woven with cosmic nebula dust and bioluminescent flora. The central focus is a stylized silhouette of a majestic, stylized celestial owl perched on glowing roots. The composition is circular and highly detailed, designed with strong black and white contrast, enhanced by pops of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and soft gold accents. The style is minimalist yet intricate, reminiscent of zentangle mixed with modern vector art and Art Nouveau etchings. The elements should have clean, defined edges and a slight woodcut/linocut aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Perfect central composition, high contrast, symmetrical balance.
